TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Cayamavana ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 110 buwan, 297 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 208 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 89 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 55%, Bunun 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cayamavana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cayamavana hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cayamavana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cayamavana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cayamavana hya' ga Sinvi. cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax qu Cayamavana. rekisi ke sinnhen Cyorokay kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨajama*ana ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu zzik βalaj rɣjax qu ʦ~ʨajama*ana. rekis~ɕi ke s~ɕinnħen ʦ~ʨjorokaj kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj
S.FORM: alang Cayamavana ga niya mki sku Kagi Keng atu Arisan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 110 buwan, 297 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 70% kyan ku 208 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 30% kyan ku 89 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Cou 55%, Bunun 15%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Cayamavana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Cayamavana hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Cayamavana hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Cayamavana hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Cayamavana hya' ga Sinvi. cyux maki squ zzik balay rgyax qu Cayamavana. rekisi ke sinnhen Cyorokay kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh hmgiru lmosay
S.PHON: alaŋ ʦ~ʨajama*ana ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kaɣi keŋ atu aris~ɕan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, ʦ~ʨou **%, βunun **%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ʦ~ʨajama*ana ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕin*i. ʦ~ʨjux maki s~ɕqu zzik βalaj rɣjax qu ʦ~ʨajama*ana. rekis~ɕi ke s~ɕinnħen ʦ~ʨjorokaj kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ ħmɣiru lmos~ɕaj
